title: Dark Empire endnotes
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''Dark Empire'' endnotes}}
The '''''Dark Empire'' endnotes''' were miniature essays by [[Tom Veitch]] exploring the backstory of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'', and later included concept art by [[Cam Kennedy]]. They appeared in the back of each issue when they were first published, and were compiled at the back of the first two editions of the [[Star Wars: Dark Empire (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Dark Empire'' trade paperback]] with some changes made. The endnotes were dropped from the third printing on, which made them extremely rare. However, they became widely available again after being reprinted in ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 5]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends: The New Republic Omnibus Vol. 2]]''.

Among the topics covered are the history of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] since the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] research into the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]], [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]], and ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. It also is the first mention of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]], and the events that would become the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] series. However, as the background given in the endnotes was essentially a rough draft, it is very different from the actual ''Tales of the Jedi'' comics.

Much of the information in the endnotes was incorporated into the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''.

Unique information was also presented in the opening crawls of each issue, such as the revelation that one of Palpatine's clones is fifteen-years-old.<ref name="DE">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref>

The checklists for the tenth and eleventh issues of [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse International's]] [[Star Wars (Dark Horse International)|''Star Wars'']] comics refer to a "''Dark Empire Technical Readout''" feature by Veitch and Kennedy that was the "First time publication anywhere in the Galaxy!" in 1993. It was promoted to begin with a focus on [[bounty hunter]]s but the material was not released with issue 10 and that comic ultimately became the last of the series as the book was canceled.

==Essays==
'''[[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]]'''
*From a Time of Peace... To a Time of Darkness
*Tempered by the Realities of War
*A Jedi's Greatest Ally is the Force
*The Alliance Seizes the Day
*"The Force is Strong in Your Family..."
*The Ordeal of Luke Skywalker
*Powers of a Jedi

'''[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]]'''
*"You Don't Know the Power of the Dark Side... The Emperor Will Show You the True Nature of the Force. He is Your Master Now!" -Darth Vader Speaking to Luke Skywalker
*Flesh Does Not Easily Support This Power
*The Secret of Ashka Boda
*The Cloning of Absolute Malevolence
*Welcome to Byss, A Dark Side World
*Byss is a Place of Ominous Peace and Harmony
*War Technology More Lethal Than the Death Star

'''[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]]'''
*If Skywalker is Lost, The Alliance is Finished!
*To Nar Shaddaa, A Lawless Derelict World
*Down Among the Corellian Pirates
*Mako Spince - Han Solo's Classmate at the Imperial Academy
*Shug Ninx - Another Cohort from the Wild Youth of Han Solo
*Sala Zend and the Starlight Intruder
*In the Turbulent Streets of the Vertical City
*The Fall of a Jedi

'''[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]]'''
*The Jedi Knights Were Powerful & Respected Throughout the Galaxy for a Thousand Generations
*"Such an Old Lightsword is Not a Worthy Weapon for You!"
*The Ancient Jedi Were Powerful... But They Were Supplanted by the Dark Side
*The Emperor's Darkest Secrets...
*The Book of Anger
*The Weakness of Inferiors
*"My Clones Are the Future of the Galaxy!"
*"Your Father Knew the Dark Side Well"
*Can Luke Really Conquer the Dark Side?
*The Emperor Has Taken Luke's Betrayal into Account

'''[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]]'''
*The Jedi Holocron is a Legendary Wisdom Source, Lost for Over 300 Years
*In the Hands of a True Jedi, The Holocron Becomes an Interactive Wisdom Source
*The Coming of the Krath
*Ulic Qel-Droma, A Great Jedi of Four Thousand Years Ago
*A Warning from Master Thon
*Warrior Magus and Master of the Dark Side
*Leia Fears the Unthinkable

'''[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]'''
*"Now You Will Experience the Full Power of the Dark Side!"
*A Jedi's Strength Flows from the Force
*A Tidal Wave of Light
*The Limitations of the Dark Side Are Known
*One Jedi Cannot Conquer the Dark Side Alone
*The Jedi Knights Must Rise Again
